popularStory.headline: Ferdinand IV of Castile (6 December 1285-7 September 1312)
popularStory.description:
Ferdinand IV of Castile (6 December 1285-7 September 1312) called the Summoned (el Emplazado), was a King of Castile and León from 1295 until his death.

During his minority, his upbringing and the cu …

zh.Sevilla, Andalucía, España: 西班牙安達盧希亞澤維利亞
zh.lifeSummary: 當Infante Fadrique Alfonso Enríquez de Castilla I Señor de Haro於1334年1月13日出生在西班牙安達盧希亞澤維利亞時，他的父親King Alfonso XI "the Just" King of Castile and León King of Castile and LeKing of Castile and León22歲，母親señora de Medina Sidonia Leonor Núñez de Guzmán24歲。他去世在西班牙。

zh-hans.Sevilla, Andalucía, España: 西班牙安達盧希亞澤維利亞
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Infante Fadrique Alfonso Enríquez de Castilla I Señor de Haro于1334年1月13日出生在西班牙安達盧希亞澤維利亞时，他的父亲King Alfonso XI "the Just" King of Castile and León King of Castile and LeKing of Castile and León22岁，母亲señora de Medina Sidonia Leonor Núñez de Guzmán24岁。他去世在西班牙。

nameMeanings.name: Enríquez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Jesus, Carlos, Manuel, Luis, Raul, Miguel, Jaime, Jorge, Pedro, Roberto.
Spanish (Enríquez): patronymic from Enrique . Compare Henriquez .

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the Spanish surname (see 1 above) at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the name their families used as Catholics.

variants.name: Enriques
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Andres, Agustin, Alberto, Alejandro, Alfredo, Anselmo, Arturo, Blanca, Carlos, Edgardo, Efren.
Spanish: variant of   Enriquez  .

variants.name: Enrriquez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Enríquez (see Enriquez ).

variants.name: Henriquez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Carlos, Manuel, Ana, Francisco, Rafael, Mario, Miguel, Ricardo, Pedro.
Spanish (Henríquez) and Jewish (Sephardic): variant of Enríquez (see Enriquez ).

variants.name: Enrique
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Luis, Santiago, Julio, Nelida, Raul, Alberto, Alejandro, Alejo, Alicia, Amalia, Andres.
Spanish: from the personal name Enrique, an equivalent of Henry .

variants.name: Enriguez
meanings: Hispanic (Enríguez): altered form of Spanish Enríquez (see Enriquez ).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Castilla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Alfredo, Carlos, Raul, Sergio, Jesus, Jorge, Pablo, Ruben, Blanca, Elido, Francisco, Guillermo.
Spanish: habitational name from Castile (Spanish Castilla), a region in central Spain. The name derives from the many castles in the region. This surname is also found in southern France.
History: As an independent kingdom between the 10th and 15th centuries, Castile formed the largest power in the Iberian peninsula.

variants.name: Castiglia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Annamarie, Antonino, Benedetto, Carmine, Francesco, Gaetano, Gennaro, Giacomo, Giuseppe, Ignazio.
Italian: habitational name from Castile (Italian Castiglia) in central Spain (see Castilla ).

nameMeanings.name: Alfonso
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Visigothic: probably a compound of adal ‘noble’ + funs ‘ready’; a traditional royal name.

variants.name: Alonso
meanings: Variant of   Alfonso .

en.lifeSummary: When Infante Fadrique Alfonso Enríquez de Castilla I Señor de Haro was born on 13 January 1334, in Sevilla, Andalusia, Spain, his father, King Alfonso XI "the Just" King of Castile and León King of Castile and LeKing of Castile and León, was 22 and his mother, señora de Medina Sidonia Leonor Núñez de Guzmán, was 24. He died in Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Infante Fadrique Alfonso Enríquez de Castilla I Señor de Haro est né le 13 janvier 1334, à Sevilla, Andalucía, Espagne, son père, King Alfonso XI "the Just" King of Castile and León King of Castile and LeKing of Castile and León, avait 22 ans et sa mère, señora de Medina Sidonia Leonor Núñez de Guzmán, avait 24 ans. Il est décédé à Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Infante Fadrique Alfonso Enríquez de Castilla I Señor de Haro am 13. Januar 1334 in Sevilla, Andalucía, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater King Alfonso XI "the Just" King of Castile and León King of Castile and LeKing of Castile and León 22 und seine Mutter señora de Medina Sidonia Leonor Núñez de Guzmán 24. Er starb in Spanien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Infante Fadrique Alfonso Enríquez de Castilla I Señor de Haro è nato il il 13 gennaio 1334 nel Sevilla, Andalucía, Spagna, il suo padre, King Alfonso XI "the Just" King of Castile and León King of Castile and LeKing of Castile and León, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, señora de Medina Sidonia Leonor Núñez de Guzmán, aveva 24 anni. Morì nel Spagna.

ja.Sevilla, Andalucía, España: スペインアンダルクiアセヴィラ
ja.lifeSummary: Infante Fadrique Alfonso Enríquez de Castilla I Señor de Haroが1334年1月13日にスペインアンダルクiアセヴィラで生まれた時，父King Alfonso XI "the Just" King of Castile and León King of Castile and LeKing of Castile and Leónは22歳，母señora de Medina Sidonia Leonor Núñez de Guzmánは24歳であった。彼はスペインで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Infante Fadrique Alfonso Enríquez de Castilla I Señor de Haro(이)가 1334년 1월 13일 스페인 앤다루ci아 세비라에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 King Alfonso XI "the Just" King of Castile and León King of Castile and LeKing of Castile and León(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 señora de Medina Sidonia Leonor Núñez de Guzmán(은)는 24세였다. 그는 스페인에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Infante Fadrique Alfonso Enríquez de Castilla I Señor de Haro nasceu em 13 de janeiro de 1334, em Sevilla, Andaluzia, Espanha, seu pai, King Alfonso XI "the Just" King of Castile and León King of Castile and LeKing of Castile and León, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, señora de Medina Sidonia Leonor Núñez de Guzmán, tinha 24 anos. Ele faleceu em Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Infante Fadrique Alfonso Enríquez de Castilla I Señor de Haro родился 13 января 1334 г. в местности севилла, андалукiа, Испания, его отцу по имени King Alfonso XI "the Just" King of Castile and León King of Castile and LeKing of Castile and León было 22 года, а матери, которую звали señora de Medina Sidonia Leonor Núñez de Guzmán, 24. Он умер в местности Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Infante Fadrique Alfonso Enríquez de Castilla I Señor de Haro nació el 13 de enero de 1334, en Sevilla, Andalucía, España, su papá, King Alfonso XI "the Just" King of Castile and León King of Castile and LeKing of Castile and León, tenía 22 años y su mamá, señora de Medina Sidonia Leonor Núñez de Guzmán, tenía 24 años. Murió en España.
